tools.name: search_domains
tools.description:
Search for expired and auction domains with various filters.
    Returns up to 50 domains sorted by quality. First 10 show full names, rest are masked.
    Sign up at catchdoms.com/register for full access.

tools.name: list_filters
tools.description:
Get available filter options for searching domains.
    Returns sources, TLDs with counts, and languages with counts.
    Useful for exploring what's in the database.

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description:
Get platform statistics.
    Returns total domains, new domains today, domains by source, and SEO coverage.
